title: Quiz from Notes

instructions.text: Use your notes to answer quiz questions
instructions.audio: Your notes have all the answers

notes:
**Water Cycle:**
• Evaporation (water → air)
• Condensation (air → clouds)
• Precipitation (clouds → rain)
• Runoff (rain → ocean)

**Why Important:**
• Provides fresh water
• Distributes heat
• Supports life

questions.question: What happens first in the water cycle?

perfect.audio: Your notes helped you ace it!

tryAgain.message: Look back at your notes carefully
tryAgain.audio: The answer is in your notes
